examples: I've also added my own little flourish, caramelized pecans, which add a crunchy nuttiness to every spoonful.
Sunchokes' amped-up wintertime sweetness and delicate nuttiness play well in all kinds of seasonal preparations.
Newton escaped the world through nuttiness, Darwin through elaborate evasive courtesies and by farming out the politics to Huxley.
"If anything, it shows the nuttiness of the interim period, " Graber said of the unclear nature of Maryland state law in apparent transition.
